referenceText: I need help checking in for my appointment.
Where is the pharmacy located in this building?
Please describe your symptoms to the doctor.
Do you have any allergies to medication?
Your next visit is scheduled for Monday morning.
Necesito ayuda para registrarme para mi cita.
¿Dónde está la farmacia en este edificio?
Por favor describa sus síntomas al doctor.
Su próxima visita está programada para el lunes.
